title: Craftable Netherite Upgrade
description: Tired of spending hours to find a Bastion well now you can craft the Netherite upgrade with magma cream and a Ghast tear
body:
Have you spent ten hours to find Netherite Debris just to find out you need to spend ten more hours finding a Nether Bastion to get a Netherite Upgrade well now you can just craft an Netherite Upgrade with 8 Magma Cream and one Ghast tear!

![Use 8 magma cream and one ghast tear in the middle to craft a netherite upgrade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QJU53UtG/images/4256daadaf0e379bb5f1cbc0429b4c122b56ec61.png)

Made with MCreator
